channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: As voters prioritize cost of living, focus on abortion evolves in midterm elections
item.description: There's been a shift in attention in the party ahead of the midterms as voters rank affordability the top issue. That raises questions about what an e...

item.title: What is the 'tarps off' trend that men are engaging in? Find out in the quiz
item.description: Plus: The L.A. mayoral race, AI court battles, extinct animals and Eurovision!

item.title: Uncertainty over whether Trump's rural health fund could have saved a life
item.description: Republicans pledge $50 billion for rural health, but it may not support ongoing efforts in North Carolina.

item.title: Stephen Colbert's 'Late Show' concludes with a musical finale and a wormhole
item.description: Colbert ended his CBS show with a sci-fi-themed sendoff featuring Paul McCartney, Elvis Costello, and Jon Batiste.
